summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: 3-sentence corpus at top; query 'after the cat'. ValueTracker n_gram_tr cycles through 1-gram (prior), 2-gram (given 'cat'), 3-gram (given 'the cat'). always_redraw BLUE bar chart of P(w) over vocabulary with probability labels + method label. Higher n sharpens to 'sat' and 'ate'.
